name: Temple
description: This is the north end of a large temple. On the east wall is an ancient inscription, probably a prayer in a long-forgotten language. Below the prayer is a staircase leading down. The west wall is solid granite. The exit to the north end of the room is through huge marble pillars. A small brass bell sits where someone clearly expected it to be used.

interactables.name: brass bell
interactables.description: A small brass bell, tarnished but intact. It looks like it has been rung in places where sound was the polite option.
